wine_restaurants.name: schanz. restaurant.
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern fine dining with a classic French base; tasting menus engineered for the cellar, with the family estate's own Piesporter Rieslings on the list
wine_restaurants.description: Thomas Schanz's destination restaurant in Piesport, home of the Goldtroepfchen vineyard. The cellar, run with sommelier Aleks Petrovic, is deep in aged Mosel Riesling including the family's own estate wines.

wine_restaurants.name: BECKER'S Restaurant
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Contemporary fine dining in a minimalist room; four- to six-course menus with a wine list led by the chef-patron's own Olewig estate wines
wine_restaurants.description: Trier's only Michelin-starred restaurant, run by chef-patron and trained winemaker Wolfgang Becker alongside winemaker-sommelier Christine Becker. The list features the family's own Olewig vineyard wines.

wine_restaurants.name: BECKER'S Weinhaus
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional Mosel cuisine in a traditional wine house, built around the family's own Becker estate wines
wine_restaurants.description: The relaxed Weinhaus sister venue to Becker's starred restaurant in Trier-Olewig, serving regional plates with the family's own vineyard wines from their 20,000-vine estate.

wine_restaurants.name: Waldhotel Sonnora
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Classic French haute cuisine; an extensive wine list especially deep in German Riesling, with 34 wines by the glass
wine_restaurants.description: Three-Michelin-star institution in Dreis near Wittlich, in the Mosel hinterland. Classic French cooking with a wine list rich in German Riesling and an unusually broad by-the-glass programme.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Bagatelle
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern fine dining on the Mosel bank with a wine list focused on Mosel-area producers
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant from chef Gerald Schoeberl, set directly on the Mosel at Zurlauben in Trier. The wine selection is built around Mosel-area growers.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Zum Domstein
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional and Roman-inspired cuisine over a Roman cellar; large list of mainly local Mosel wines with regular tastings
wine_restaurants.description: Trier landmark on the Hauptmarkt built over a Roman cellar rediscovered during renovation. A large, mainly local Mosel wine list, displayed bottles in the basement, and frequent wine-tasting events.

wine_restaurants.name: Das Weinhaus by Otti Buesching
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Family-run restaurant where wine is the focus; a remarkable Mosel-led list spanning all the region's vineyards plus international bottles
wine_restaurants.description: Family restaurant and wine shop in central Trier where the wine takes top billing. Mosel wines from across the region's vineyards anchor a remarkable list, with bottles from Italy, France and beyond alongside.

wine_restaurants.name: Rainer's Restaurant Alte Thorschenke
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional Mosel cooking in a historic wine tavern serving local Moselle wines, set in the medieval town gate
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant in the Alte Thorschenke, a 1332 inn forming part of Cochem's town wall and gate. Local Moselle wines are served in the cosy wine tavern alongside regional dishes.

wine_restaurants.name: Gutsweinschaenke Muellers
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Estate wine tavern serving regional Mosel dishes paired with the house wines, with grower-led wine seminars
wine_restaurants.description: Estate Gutsweinschaenke in the centre of the wine village of Kroev, pairing regional Mosel plates with its own wines and offering small-group wine seminars led by the winemaker.
